'''Sarko''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who tried to capture [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]].
